titleStmt.title: SII 17.693: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 693. (A.R. No. 637 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.
The details of date i.e., Śaka 1338, Naḷa, Arpaśi, 25 are irregular. If the Śaka year quoted is a mistake for Ś. 1358, the date would correspond to 1436 A.D.

This inscription records the gift of two door-ways in the shrine of Tiruvālīśvaramuḍaiya nāyanār and the setting up of an image of Tiruppaḷḷi-nāchchiyār for the god, by Śakkaraśar, son of Ayyaluppi Kaḍaiyār Vide No. 725 below.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti [.] sakāttam 1000 3 100 3 10 8
cellāṉiṉ
ṟa naḷa varuṣam Aṟpaci
mātam 2 10 5 ti A
yyaluppi kaṭaiyār
makaṉār cakkaracar tiru
vālicuramuṭaiya ṉā
yaṉāṟku tiruppaḷḷi ṉācci
yārum tirukkatavu Iraṇ
ṭum Aracar tiruppaṇi .There is another damaged inscription below this which reads:— 1 svasti śrīmanma[hā]maṇḍa- 2 licuranāna ti•••• 3•••••••••• 4•••••••• 5•••••••• 6•••••••• 7 •••• viṭaiyā- 8 ••• uṭaiya[r] 9 ••• [rai] vayirava ṉāyiṉārṟ 10 . teva[rā]ya makārāyaṟku 11 ••• � tam atikā 12 •••••to
Digital edition of SII 17.693 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
